meta_title: For Founders: marketing automation to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to marketing automation and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Marketing Automation to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. Learn to implement marketing automation for your SaaS MVP using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert-led checklist.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start shipping. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can automate your marketing engine in hours. Focus on building high-value automation triggers that convert users, not just learning syntax. Speed to market is your only true competitive advantage.
content.intro:
The screen glows with the 40th 'Hello World' tutorial of the month, but your bank account remains static. You are trapped in the viscous, soul-crushing cycle of tutorial hell, where the illusion of progress masks a complete lack of product-market fit. You aren't building a business; you're building a collection of abandoned GitHub repositories.

It is time to pivot from student to architect. By integrating automated marketing workflows directly into your MVP, you stop chasing vanity metrics and start building a revenue-generating machine. This checklist provides the tactical blueprint to force-multiply your development speed and launch a product that actually sells itself.

steps.title: Define the Value Trigger
steps.description: Identify the exact action a user takes that proves they find value in your tool. This is the hook for your automation sequence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a user journey map for a SaaS product that triggers a welcome email sequence based on the user's first successful API call.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'map out user journey for onboarding automation'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Automation Engine
steps.description: Don't build from scratch. Use Antigravity to scaffold the backend integration between your database and your email service provider.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Node.js backend integration that listens for a 'user_signed_up' event in Postgres and triggers an API request to Mailgun.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --package 'pg' 'mailgun.js' && claude run 'implement webhook handler'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Lead Scoring
steps.description: Programmatically grade user activity to prioritize high-intent prospects for your sales pipeline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a function to calculate a lead score based on login frequency, feature usage, and profile completion percentage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'services/leadScoring.js' --add-logic 'calculate score based on usage stats'

steps.title: Automate Content Distribution
steps.description: Use Claude Code to hook your product updates into social media channels automatically, keeping your audience engaged without manual effort.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script that pulls recent blog posts from a headless CMS and posts a summary to Twitter and LinkedIn via API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create social media auto-poster script'

steps.title: Deploy and Monitor Performance
steps.description: Ship the automation and configure automated alerts to monitor for delivery failures or churn signals.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure an error-handling middleware that alerts Slack when a marketing automation trigger fails to fire.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add slack alerting to automation pipeline'

pro_tips: Never build an automation that requires manual oversight; if it can't run while you sleep, it isn't an asset.
Prioritize 'Time-to-First-Value' (TTFV) in your automation; get them to the 'Aha!' moment before the first email lands.
Use Claude Code to perform 'automated code reviews' on your own PRs to catch security vulnerabilities before deployment.
Data-driven iteration: If an email sequence has an open rate below 30%, kill it and rewrite the subject line immediately.
Treat your marketing code with the same rigor as your payment processing code; bugs in automation lead to brand erosion.
content.next_steps: Once the automation is live, perform a 'cold start' test with 10 real users. Monitor the conversion rate from trial to paid, then scale your acquisition channels.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the sake of coding and start building for the sake of growth. You have the tools, the strategy, and the blueprint. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
